items.title_original: Australian Jews Testify on Experiences of Antisemitism in Bondi Beach Inquiry
items.title_neutral: Australian Jews Testify on Experiences of Antisemitism in Bondi Beach Inquiry
items.excerpt: As part of a public inquiry into the massacre at Bondi Beach, dozens have described being targeted for their Jewish identity in their daily lives.
